# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    global:
      proxy:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      enableNamespacesByDefault: true

---
apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15020
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "*/*"
  workloadSelector: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - name: admin
    port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
  selector:
    security.istio.io/tlsMode: istio

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - "15000"
        paths:
        - "/config_dump*"
        - "/stats*"
        - "/clusters*"
        - "/server_info*"
        - "/runtime*"
        - "/listeners*"
        - "/certs*"
        - "/memory*"
        - "/ready*"

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      security.istio.io/tlsMode: istio
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
    from:
    - podSelector: {}
    - namespaceSelector: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-mesh-config
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  mesh: |
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      discoveryAddress: istiod.istio-system.svc:15012
      tracing:
        zipkin:
          address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
      proxyMetadata: {}
      concurrency: 2

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      listener:
        portNumber: 15000
        filterChain:
          filter:
            name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: admin
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: admin
              domains:
              - "*"
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: /config_dump
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /stats
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /clusters
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /server_info
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /runtime
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /listeners
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /certs
                route:
                  cluster: admin_port_cluster
